title: eryngium huteri
intro: Eryngium huteri, also known as a type of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae, is a rare and endangered species commonly found in the Iberian Peninsula. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Eryngium huteri include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Eryngium huteri is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its availability and use may be limited due to its rarity and conservation status.
